metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_1029
metadata.comment:
Rationale: The paper uses pre-embedding immunogold-Silver detection to study the subcellular localization of WLS in the fly neuromuscular junction. Wls is a multi-pass transmembrane glycoprotein essential for Wnt cell signaling.

Figure 5F, 5J shows Wls/Evi at the presynaptic membrane (presynaptic compartment labelled in pink).
Fig. 5G shows Wls/Evi at large presynaptic multi-membrane structures.. Experimental description: 'Fly Strains: Flies were reared in standard Drosophila media at 25°C unless otherwise stated. (See Suppl. Materials for fly strains.) RNAi crosses and controls were performed at 29°C. The wgts flies were tested at the restrictive temperature (25°C).'

checks.label: OWL Consistency
checks.error_message: No inferences attributed to this model graph in the materializer output. Likely a parse failure or other materializer skip — re-run on this model alone to investigate.
